questions.sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.doi_days, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date, r.risk_reasons
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC, r.material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.doi_days, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date, r.risk_reasons
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC, r.material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: PN-00003 当前的风险等级、DOI、缺口、断料日和风险原因是什么？
questions.answer: PN-00003 当前风险等级 **RED**，DOI **2.1** 天，缺口 **13153**，断料日 **2016-05-25**，风险原因 **GAP_BEFORE_LT;LOW_DOI**。
questions.sql:
SELECT material_pn, risk_level, doi_days, gap_qty, gap_date, risk_reasons
FROM material_risk
WHERE material_pn = 'PN-00003'
  AND eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT material_pn, risk_level, doi_days, gap_qty, gap_date, risk_reasons
FROM material_risk
WHERE material_pn = 'PN-00003'
  AND eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 列出当前预测期内存在缺口的全部物料。
questions.sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date, r.risk_level
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.gap_qty > 0
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC, r.material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date, r.risk_level
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.gap_qty > 0
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC, r.material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 断料日最早的物料有哪些？各自缺口量是多少？
questions.sql:
WITH earliest AS (
  SELECT min(gap_date) AS min_gap_date
  FROM material_risk
  WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
    AND gap_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_date, r.gap_qty
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
CROSS JOIN earliest e
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.gap_date = e.min_gap_date
ORDER BY r.material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH earliest AS (
  SELECT min(gap_date) AS min_gap_date
  FROM material_risk
  WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
    AND gap_date IS NOT NULL
)
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_date, r.gap_qty
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
CROSS JOIN earliest e
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.gap_date = e.min_gap_date
ORDER BY r.material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.sql:
SELECT ss.material_pn, m.material_name
FROM supply_split ss
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
GROUP BY ss.material_pn, m.material_name
HAVING count(DISTINCT ss.supplier_id) = 1
ORDER BY ss.material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT ss.material_pn, m.material_name
FROM supply_split ss
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
GROUP BY ss.material_pn, m.material_name
HAVING count(DISTINCT ss.supplier_id) = 1
ORDER BY ss.material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 当前供应商集中度最高的 10 个物料是哪些？
questions.answer: 根据查询结果，供应商集中度最高的10个物料如下：PN-00015（Pouch 015）、PN-00027（Protein 027）、PN-00031（Carton 031）、PN-00037（Grain 037）、PN-00039（Primary Label 039）、PN-00043（Flavor 043）、PN-00046（Carton 046）、PN-00047（Oil 047）、PN-00052（Grain 052）、PN-00060（Pouch 060）。这些物料的供应商集中度均为100%，且各仅有1家供应商，属于单源风险。
questions.sql:
SELECT ss.material_pn, m.material_name, max(ss.split_pct) AS supplier_concentration,
       count(*) AS supplier_count
FROM supply_split ss JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
GROUP BY ss.material_pn, m.material_name
ORDER BY max(ss.split_pct) DESC, ss.material_pn
LIMIT 10
questions.final_sql:
SELECT ss.material_pn, m.material_name, max(ss.split_pct) AS supplier_concentration,
       count(*) AS supplier_count
FROM supply_split ss JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
GROUP BY ss.material_pn, m.material_name
ORDER BY max(ss.split_pct) DESC, ss.material_pn
LIMIT 10

questions.question: 分别汇总当前 commodity 和 item group 的红色物料总数与总缺口。
questions.answer: 查询被安全策略拒绝：multiple_statements: exactly one SQL statement is allowed
questions.sql:
-- 按 commodity 汇总当前红色物料数量和总缺口
SELECT m.commodity,
       COUNT(DISTINCT r.material_pn) AS red_material_count,
       COALESCE(SUM(r.gap_qty), 0) AS total_gap_qty
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m ON r.material_pn = m.material_pn
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
GROUP BY m.commodity
ORDER BY total_gap_qty DESC, m.commodity;

-- 按 item_group 汇总当前红色物料数量和总缺口
SELECT m.item_group,
       COUNT(DISTINCT r.material_pn) AS red_material_count,
       COALESCE(SUM(r.gap_qty), 0) AS total_gap_qty
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m ON r.material_pn = m.material_pn
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
GROUP BY m.item_group
ORDER BY total_gap_qty DESC, m.item_group;

questions.sql:
SELECT b.material_pn, m.material_name, count(DISTINCT b.sku_id) AS sku_count
FROM bom b
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
GROUP BY b.material_pn, m.material_name
ORDER BY sku_count DESC, b.material_pn

FROM bom b
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)

ORDER BY sku_count DESC, b.material_pn
LIMIT 10

questions.question: 当前尚未到货且数量最大的 5 张采购单是什么？同时给出供应商。
questions.sql:
SELECT p.po_id, p.material_pn, p.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, p.qty, p.eta_date
FROM open_po p
JOIN suppliers s USING (supplier_id)
WHERE p.eta_date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
ORDER BY p.qty DESC
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
SELECT p.po_id, p.material_pn, p.supplier_id, s.supplier_name, p.qty, p.eta_date
FROM open_po p
JOIN suppliers s USING (supplier_id)
WHERE p.eta_date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
ORDER BY p.qty DESC
LIMIT 5

questions.question: 最近 14 天实际销量最高的 5 个 SKU 是哪些？
questions.sql:
SELECT sku_id, SUM(units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily
WHERE date >= (SELECT MAX(date) FROM sales_daily) - INTERVAL 13 DAY
GROUP BY sku_id
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
SELECT sku_id, SUM(units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily
WHERE date >= (SELECT MAX(date) FROM sales_daily) - INTERVAL 13 DAY
GROUP BY sku_id
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 5

questions.question: 历史上总销量最高的 5 个事件日类型是什么？
questions.answer: 历史上总销量最高的5个事件日类型是：LaborDay（17052单位）、IndependenceDay（16971单位）、SuperBowl（14733单位）、Ramadan starts（14641单位）、Eid al-Fitr（13811单位）。
questions.sql:
SELECT c.event_name, sum(s.units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN calendar c ON s.date = c.date
WHERE c.event_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.event_name
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
SELECT c.event_name, sum(s.units_sold) AS total_units
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN calendar c ON s.date = c.date
WHERE c.event_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.event_name
ORDER BY total_units DESC
LIMIT 5

questions.question: LightGBM 未来 28 天预测量最高的 5 个成品是什么？同时给出产品名和最近 28 天实际总销量。
questions.answer:
根据结果集，LightGBM 未来28天预测量最高的5个成品如下：

1. **Contoso Frozen 068** (FOODS_3_586): 预测 4777.15, 实际 4532  
2. **Contoso Pantry 007** (FOODS_3_090): 预测 4685.42, 实际 7174  
3. **Contoso Snacks 021** (FOODS_3_252): 预测 3763.11, 实际 3890  
4. **Contoso Pantry 011** (FOODS_3_120): 预测 3753.14, 实际 3660  
5. **Contoso Snacks 069** (FOODS_3_587): 预测 2543.78, 实际 2460
questions.sql:
WITH max_sales_date AS (
  SELECT max(date) AS t FROM sales_daily
),
forecast_top AS (
  SELECT sku_id, sum(yhat) AS forecast_28d
  FROM forecast_daily
  WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
  GROUP BY sku_id
  ORDER BY forecast_28d DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT ft.sku_id, p.product_name, ft.forecast_28d,
       coalesce(sum(sd.units_sold), 0) AS actual_last_28d
FROM forecast_top ft
LEFT JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
LEFT JOIN sales_daily sd ON sd.sku_id = ft.sku_id
  AND sd.date > (SELECT t FROM max_sales_date) - INTERVAL 28 DAY
  AND sd.date <= (SELECT t FROM max_sales_date)
GROUP BY ft.sku_id, p.product_name, ft.forecast_28d
ORDER BY ft.forecast_28d DESC
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH max_sales_date AS (
  SELECT max(date) AS t FROM sales_daily
),
forecast_top AS (
  SELECT sku_id, sum(yhat) AS forecast_28d
  FROM forecast_daily
  WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
  GROUP BY sku_id
  ORDER BY forecast_28d DESC
  LIMIT 5
)
SELECT ft.sku_id, p.product_name, ft.forecast_28d,
       coalesce(sum(sd.units_sold), 0) AS actual_last_28d
FROM forecast_top ft
LEFT JOIN products p USING (sku_id)
LEFT JOIN sales_daily sd ON sd.sku_id = ft.sku_id
  AND sd.date > (SELECT t FROM max_sales_date) - INTERVAL 28 DAY
  AND sd.date <= (SELECT t FROM max_sales_date)
GROUP BY ft.sku_id, p.product_name, ft.forecast_28d
ORDER BY ft.forecast_28d DESC) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 按三折平均 MAPE 选出的最佳回测模型是什么？它的平均 MAPE 和 WRMSSE 是多少？
questions.answer: 最佳回测模型是 lightgbm，其平均 MAPE 为 47.4727，平均 WRMSSE 为 0.8847。
questions.sql:
SELECT model_name,
       round(avg(mape), 4) AS avg_mape,
       round(avg(wrmsse), 4) AS avg_wrmsse
FROM forecast_metrics
GROUP BY model_name
ORDER BY avg_mape
LIMIT 1
questions.final_sql:
SELECT model_name,
       round(avg(mape), 4) AS avg_mape,
       round(avg(wrmsse), 4) AS avg_wrmsse
FROM forecast_metrics
GROUP BY model_name
ORDER BY avg_mape
LIMIT 1

questions.question: 未来 28 天预测需求量最高的 10 个物料是哪些？
questions.sql:
SELECT material_pn, SUM(demand_qty) AS total_demand
FROM v_material_demand_daily
WHERE date >= (SELECT MAX(date) FROM forecast_daily) - INTERVAL '27 days'
  AND date <= (SELECT MAX(date) FROM forecast_daily)
GROUP BY material_pn
ORDER BY total_demand DESC, material_pn
LIMIT 10
questions.final_sql:
SELECT material_pn, SUM(demand_qty) AS total_demand
FROM v_material_demand_daily
WHERE date >= (SELECT MAX(date) FROM forecast_daily) - INTERVAL '27 days'
  AND date <= (SELECT MAX(date) FROM forecast_daily)
GROUP BY material_pn
ORDER BY total_demand DESC, material_pn
LIMIT 10

questions.question: 红色风险而且还是单源的物料，会影响哪些成品？
questions.answer:
红色风险且单源的物料及其影响的成品如下：

- **PN-00214 (Case Label 214)** → Contoso Beverage 054  
- **PN-00046 (Carton 046)** → Contoso Snacks 005、Contoso Beverage 046、Contoso Beverage 050、Contoso Beverage 054、Contoso Snacks 069、Contoso Pantry 087  
- **PN-00212 (Oil 212)** → Contoso Frozen 052  
- **PN-00068 (Color 068)** → Contoso Frozen 008  
- **PN-00213 (Preservative 213)** → Contoso Snacks 053  
- **PN-00273 (Preservative 273)** → Contoso Snacks 013  
- **PN-00211 (Carton 211)** → Contoso Pantry 051  
- **PN-00139 (Primary Label 139)** → Contoso Pantry 079  
- **PN-00248 (Color 248)** → Contoso Frozen 088  
- **PN-00297 (Protein 297)** → Contoso Snacks 037
questions.sql:
WITH single_source AS (
  SELECT material_pn
  FROM supply_split
  GROUP BY material_pn
  HAVING count(*) = 1
)
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.risk_level, b.sku_id, p.product_name, b.qty_per_unit
FROM material_risk r
JOIN single_source s ON r.material_pn = s.material_pn
JOIN materials m ON r.material_pn = m.material_pn
JOIN bom b ON r.material_pn = b.material_pn
JOIN products p ON b.sku_id = p.sku_id
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC, r.material_pn, b.sku_id
LIMIT 20
questions.final_sql:
WITH single_source AS (
  SELECT material_pn
  FROM supply_split
  GROUP BY material_pn
  HAVING count(*) = 1
)
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.risk_level, b.sku_id, p.product_name, b.qty_per_unit
FROM material_risk r
JOIN single_source s ON r.material_pn = s.material_pn
JOIN materials m ON r.material_pn = m.material_pn
JOIN bom b ON r.material_pn = b.material_pn
JOIN products p ON b.sku_id = p.sku_id
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level = 'RED'
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC, r.material_pn, b.sku_id
LIMIT 20

questions.question: 现在缺口最大的料是什么？缺多少、还能撑几天、为什么危险？
questions.answer: 缺口最大的料是 **Preservative 003 (PN-00003)**，缺口量 **13,153**，现有库存仅能撑 **2.1 天**。危险原因：**GAP_BEFORE_LT**（预计库存转负早于提前期，断料前补不上货）和 **LOW_DOI**（库存天数过低）。
questions.sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.doi_days, r.risk_reasons
FROM material_risk r JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC
LIMIT 1
questions.final_sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.doi_days, r.risk_reasons
FROM material_risk r JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC
LIMIT 1

questions.question: 最常被共用的那个物料一旦短缺，会波及哪些 SKU？
questions.reason: no response column exactly matchs gold first-column values
questions.answer:
最常被共用的物料是 **PN-00033 (Preservative 033)**，一旦短缺会波及以下 10 个 SKU（按 sku_id 排序）：

- FOODS_3_086 → Contoso Beverage 006（用量 1.933）
- FOODS_3_351 → Contoso Snacks 033（用量 0.211）
- FOODS_3_377 → Contoso Snacks 037（用量 1.962）
- FOODS_3_474 → Contoso Snacks 049（用量 0.094）
- FOODS_3_607 → Contoso Beverage 070（用量 2.136）
- FOODS_3_695 → Contoso Beverage 078（用量 1.994）
- FOODS_3_697 → Contoso Pantry 079（用量 0.056）
- FOODS_3_741 → Contoso Pantry 087（用量 1.956）
- FOODS_3_746 → Contoso Snacks 089（用量 0.546）
- FOODS_3_756 → Contoso Frozen 092（用量 2.286）
questions.sql:
WITH top_shared_material AS (
  SELECT material_pn
  FROM bom
  GROUP BY material_pn
  ORDER BY count(DISTINCT sku_id) DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT b.material_pn, m.material_name, b.sku_id, p.product_name, b.qty_per_unit
FROM bom b
JOIN top_shared_material t ON b.material_pn = t.material_pn
JOIN materials m ON b.material_pn = m.material_pn
JOIN products p ON b.sku_id = p.sku_id
ORDER BY b.sku_id
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH top_shared_material AS (
  SELECT material_pn
  FROM bom
  GROUP BY material_pn
  ORDER BY count(DISTINCT sku_id) DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT b.material_pn, m.material_name, b.sku_id, p.product_name, b.qty_per_unit
FROM bom b
JOIN top_shared_material t ON b.material_pn = t.material_pn
JOIN materials m ON b.material_pn = m.material_pn
JOIN products p ON b.sku_id = p.sku_id
ORDER BY b.sku_id) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 接下来需求最高的三个成品是什么？按 LightGBM 看。
questions.answer: 根据 LightGBM 模型的预测，接下来需求最高的三个成品依次是：Contoso Frozen 068（4777.15）、Contoso Pantry 007（4685.42）、Contoso Snacks 021（3763.11）。
questions.sql:
SELECT sku_id, product_name, sum(yhat) AS total_forecast
FROM forecast_daily
JOIN products USING (sku_id)
WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
  AND date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
GROUP BY sku_id, product_name
ORDER BY total_forecast DESC
LIMIT 3
questions.final_sql:
SELECT sku_id, product_name, sum(yhat) AS total_forecast
FROM forecast_daily
JOIN products USING (sku_id)
WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
  AND date > (SELECT max(date) FROM sales_daily)
GROUP BY sku_id, product_name
ORDER BY total_forecast DESC
LIMIT 3

questions.question: LightGBM 未来 28 天总预测销量和最近 28 天实际销量分别是多少？
questions.answer: 根据查询结果，LightGBM 未来 28 天总预测销量为 99051.81，最近 28 天实际销量为 104881。
questions.sql:
WITH last_sale AS (
  SELECT max(date) AS dt FROM sales_daily
)
SELECT
  (SELECT sum(yhat) FROM forecast_daily, last_sale
   WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
     AND date > dt AND date <= dt + INTERVAL 28 DAY) AS lightgbm_forecast_28d,
  (SELECT sum(units_sold) FROM sales_daily, last_sale
   WHERE date <= dt AND date >= dt - INTERVAL 27 DAY) AS actual_last_28d
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (WITH last_sale AS (
  SELECT max(date) AS dt FROM sales_daily
)
SELECT
  (SELECT sum(yhat) FROM forecast_daily, last_sale
   WHERE model_name = 'lightgbm'
     AND date > dt AND date <= dt + INTERVAL 28 DAY) AS lightgbm_forecast_28d,
  (SELECT sum(units_sold) FROM sales_daily, last_sale
   WHERE date <= dt AND date >= dt - INTERVAL 27 DAY) AS actual_last_28d) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 哪些有缺口的材料同时还有未到货采购单？
questions.reason: no response column exactly matchs gold first-column values
questions.answer: 查询执行成功但没有符合条件的数据。
questions.sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date,
       count(o.po_id) AS open_po_count, sum(o.qty) AS open_po_qty
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
LEFT JOIN open_po o ON r.material_pn = o.material_pn AND o.eta_date > CURRENT_DATE
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.gap_qty > 0
GROUP BY r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date
HAVING count(o.po_id) > 0
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date,
       count(o.po_id) AS open_po_count, sum(o.qty) AS open_po_qty
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
LEFT JOIN open_po o ON r.material_pn = o.material_pn AND o.eta_date > CURRENT_DATE
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.gap_qty > 0
GROUP BY r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.gap_qty, r.gap_date
HAVING count(o.po_id) > 0
ORDER BY r.gap_qty DESC) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 供应来源太集中的风险材料有哪些？只看当前非绿色的。
questions.answer:
根据结果集，当前非绿色且供应来源集中的风险材料共55个，全部为单源（split_pct=100）。按风险等级列出：

- **红色（RED）**：Carton 046、Color 068、Primary Label 139、Carton 211、Oil 212、Preservative 213、Case Label 214、Color 248、Preservative 273、Protein 297  
- **橙色（ORANGE）**：Primary Label 129、Preservative 138、Protein 177、Flavor 193、Pouch 240、Case Label 274、Oil 287、Preservative 288  
- **黄色（YELLOW）**：Protein 027、Carton 031、Grain 037、Grain 052、Pouch 060、Preservative 063、Grain 067、Preservative 078、Preservative 093、Jar 095、Grain 097、Preservative 108、Primary Label 109、Bottle 115、Case Label 124、Film 131、Oil 137、Grain 142、Oil 152、Pouch 165、Preservative 168、Primary Label 169、Preservative 183、Oil 197、Preservative 198、Grain 202、Film 206、Grain 217、Oil 227、Jar 230、Case Label 234、Protein 237
questions.sql:
SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.risk_level, s.supplier_name, ss.split_pct
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
JOIN supply_split ss ON r.material_pn = ss.material_pn
JOIN suppliers s ON ss.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level != 'GREEN'
  AND r.material_pn IN (
      SELECT material_pn
      FROM supply_split
      GROUP BY material_pn
      HAVING count(*) = 1
  )
ORDER BY r.risk_level, r.material_pn
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT r.material_pn, m.material_name, r.risk_level, s.supplier_name, ss.split_pct
FROM material_risk r
JOIN materials m USING (material_pn)
JOIN supply_split ss ON r.material_pn = ss.material_pn
JOIN suppliers s ON ss.supplier_id = s.supplier_id
WHERE r.eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
  AND r.risk_level != 'GREEN'
  AND r.material_pn IN (
      SELECT material_pn
      FROM supply_split
      GROUP BY material_pn
      HAVING count(*) = 1
  )
ORDER BY r.risk_level, r.material_pn) AS safe_query LIMIT 200

questions.question: 历史上哪个事件对应的销量最高？
questions.answer: 历史上销量最高的事件是 LaborDay，对应销量 17052。
questions.sql:
SELECT c.event_name, SUM(s.units_sold) AS total_sales
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN calendar c ON s.date = c.date
WHERE c.event_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.event_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC, c.event_name
LIMIT 1
questions.final_sql:
SELECT c.event_name, SUM(s.units_sold) AS total_sales
FROM sales_daily s
JOIN calendar c ON s.date = c.date
WHERE c.event_name IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY c.event_name
ORDER BY total_sales DESC, c.event_name
LIMIT 1

questions.sql:
SELECT p.sku_id, p.product_name, pr.sell_price
FROM products p
JOIN prices pr ON p.sku_id = pr.sku_id
WHERE (pr.sku_id, pr.week_start) IN (
    SELECT sku_id, MAX(week_start) FROM prices GROUP BY sku_id
)
ORDER BY pr.sell_price DESC
LIMIT 5
questions.final_sql:
SELECT p.sku_id, p.product_name, pr.sell_price
FROM products p
JOIN prices pr ON p.sku_id = pr.sku_id
WHERE (pr.sku_id, pr.week_start) IN (
    SELECT sku_id, MAX(week_start) FROM prices GROUP BY sku_id
)
ORDER BY pr.sell_price DESC
LIMIT 5

questions.question: 回测下来哪个模型的平均 MAPE 最好？
questions.answer: 回测中平均 MAPE 最好的模型是 lightgbm，其平均 MAPE 为 47.47266666666667。
questions.sql:
SELECT model_name, avg(mape) AS avg_mape
FROM forecast_metrics
GROUP BY model_name
ORDER BY avg_mape
LIMIT 1
questions.final_sql:
SELECT model_name, avg(mape) AS avg_mape
FROM forecast_metrics
GROUP BY model_name
ORDER BY avg_mape
LIMIT 1

questions.question: 给我一句话说明当前四个风险等级各有多少物料。
questions.answer: 当前 RED 20 个、ORANGE 16 个、YELLOW 66 个、GREEN 198 个物料。
questions.sql:
SELECT risk_level, count(*) AS material_count
FROM material_risk
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
GROUP BY risk_level
ORDER BY CASE risk_level
         WHEN 'RED' THEN 1
         WHEN 'ORANGE' THEN 2
         WHEN 'YELLOW' THEN 3
         WHEN 'GREEN' THEN 4
         END
questions.final_sql:
SELECT * FROM (SELECT risk_level, count(*) AS material_count
FROM material_risk
WHERE eval_date = (SELECT max(eval_date) FROM material_risk)
GROUP BY risk_level
ORDER BY CASE risk_level
         WHEN 'RED' THEN 1
         WHEN 'ORANGE' THEN 2
         WHEN 'YELLOW' THEN 3
         WHEN 'GREEN' THEN 4
         END) AS safe_query LIMIT 200
